title: AI and the Job Market in 2026
summary: AWS Developers discusses strategies for tech job hunting in 2026 amid AI screening and automation. The video covers personal branding, networking value, and argues that junior developers remain valuable despite AI advances. It emphasizes that jobs evolve rather than disappear, and recommends hands-on learning through open source contributions and building projects.
writeup: AWS Developers lays out tactics for tech job hunting in 2026 as AI screening and automation reshape hiring. The video makes the case that junior developers stay valuable despite AI advances, and that roles evolve rather than vanish. Concrete takeaways: invest in personal branding and networking, and build skills through open source contributions and project work, with reference to the Feynman Principle as a learning method.
